case_title: KAFF, SVETLANA L. et al VS ALLIANCE RESIDENTIAL CO. AKA VILLAS PARKMERCED et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KAFF, SVETLANA L. KAFF, ROBERT M. AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIANCE RESIDENTIAL CO. AKA VILLAS PARKMERCED OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY AKA ALLIANCE RESIDENTIAL CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO KARSAZ & ASSOC. AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR ALLIANCE RES. CO. AKA PARKMERCED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-28-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-26-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUE TO 10-26-06 AT 1:30 P.M. FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-07-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-28-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF COMPLAINT. SETTLEMENT PENDING, IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAFF, SVETLANA L. KAFF, ROBERT M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLIANCE RESIDENTIAL CO. AKA VILLAS PARKMERCED OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY AKA ALLIANCE RESIDENTIAL CO. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,625.00, DEFENDANT'S ARE FURTHER ORDERED TO CORRECT OR WITHDRAW THE DEROGATORY REMARKS SUBMITTED TO CREDIT REPORTING AGENCIES, INCLUDING EXPERIAN, WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
